text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm summoned to the<n>director's office.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your input! ...Regarding a forthcoming<n>single is
hereby requested!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Once in a while, record<n>labels will
reach out to us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The idea is they partner with us to<n>give a top
runner in the Twinkle<n>Series a song of her own.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thus! We work tirelessly to find a<n>match between
students who put<n>their name down and company
preferences.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In the end, it's up to the individual<n>student or unit
to decide where to<n>sing or whether to release at
all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But having a special song of one's<n>own can be a
source of confidence<n>and pride.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Accordingly, we do our best to create<n>the best
match possible.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And guess whose turn it is this time?<n>That's right,
me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But the thing is, Trainer <username>... We've got<n>a bit of a,
well...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Dilemma! Truth be told, we received a<n>request
from the record label—it<n>seems there's a bit of an
issue.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, our student's potential is<n>so great,
they don't have a song<n>worthy of her!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
They're now looking to us for advice,<n>but, well,
this is not our specialty. I'm<n>at a loss for what to
say.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And that's where you come in! I've<n>heard of your
exploits in all things<n>musical lately.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
What advice would you offer<n>regarding the
production of this new<n>single? Anything that
comes to mind!
choice_data_list: Why not get a taste of Falco's day-to-day life?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Hm... I see!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
So, esteemed guests! This is the<n>racecourse used
by our students!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Please, run to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Record Label Employee A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my feet sink right into the dirt! I<n>didn't realize it
took this much<n>strength just to push off the
ground!

text_block_list.name: Record Label Employee B
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... You certainly need a lotof tenacity to run on a track like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like a grueling lap around the<n>track is
just what they needed to<n>piece together a plan for
the new<n>single.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: The basics?
choice_data_list: Like, just watching a concert or a race.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: ...Understood! I shall make the<n>arrangements!

text_block_list.name: Record Label Executive
text_block_list.text:
...This is a fantastic concert. I didn't<n>realize how
much I missed seeing<n>this.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Many thanks! I am glad I invited you<n>then!

text_block_list.name: Record Label Executive
text_block_list.text:
You know, this reminds me of how it<n>all
started—with us being deeply<n>moved by races and
concerts long<n>ago.

text_block_list.name: Record Label Executive
text_block_list.text:
Hyping up a runner's debut<n>shouldn't be our
focus—the song<n>should be about drawing out the
emotions she's dealing with for all to<n>hear.

text_block_list.name: Record Label Executive
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm going to head back to the<n>office and tell
the team right away.<n>Please look forward to our
next<n>proposal.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Of course! Oh, before you go...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to introduce Trainer <username>, the<n>brain behind
this idea.

text_block_list.name: Record Label Executive
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so I have you to thank. I hope<n>we'll be hearing
more of your ideas<n>in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the opportunity to explain the<n>Grand Concert
as well, and manage<n>to get the company's
approval and<n>support.
